---
title: "GreenLeaf CEA — Agribusiness Analytics Hackathon 2026"
subtitle: "Exploratory Data Analysis, Trend Analysis & Dashboard CSV Generation"
author: "Lavika Singh"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
    code_folding: show
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
setwd('/Users/lavikasingh/Documents/SFU/Hackathons/Beedie RBC 2026 Hackathon/hackathon files')
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.width  = 12,
  fig.height = 6,
  fig.align  = "center"
)
```

# 0. Setup — Load Libraries and Data

```{r libraries}
library(tidyverse)    # dplyr, ggplot2, tidyr, readr, purrr
library(lubridate)    # date handling
library(scales)       # axis formatting
library(corrplot)     # correlation matrix
library(RColorBrewer) # colour palettes
```

```{r load-data}
sensor      <- read_csv("daily_sensor_readings.csv")
costs       <- read_csv("daily_input_costs.csv")
plots       <- read_csv("plots.csv")
farms       <- read_csv("farms.csv")
greenhouses <- read_csv("greenhouses.csv")
inputs      <- read_csv("input_applications.csv")
season      <- read_csv("season_summary.csv")
scouting    <- read_csv("scouting_observations.csv")
prices      <- read_csv("market_and_input_prices.csv")

# Parse dates
sensor   <- sensor   %>% mutate(date = as.Date(date))
costs    <- costs    %>% mutate(date = as.Date(date))
inputs   <- inputs   %>% mutate(date = as.Date(date))
scouting <- scouting %>% mutate(date = as.Date(date))
prices   <- prices   %>% mutate(date = as.Date(date))

# Add time fields
sensor <- sensor %>%
  mutate(
    week_num   = isoweek(date),
    year       = year(date),
    month      = month(date, label = TRUE),
    week_label = paste0("Week ", week_num)
  )

cat("Data loaded successfully\n")
cat("Sensor rows     :", nrow(sensor), "\n")
cat("Date range      :", as.character(min(sensor$date)),
    "to", as.character(max(sensor$date)), "\n")
cat("Unique plots    :", n_distinct(sensor$plot_id), "\n")
cat("Unique weeks    :", n_distinct(sensor$week_num), "\n")
```

---

# 1. Dataset Overview

```{r dataset-overview}
overview <- data.frame(
  Dataset = c("daily_sensor_readings","daily_input_costs","plots","farms",
              "greenhouses","input_applications","season_summary",
              "scouting_observations","market_and_input_prices"),
  Rows    = c(nrow(sensor), nrow(costs), nrow(plots), nrow(farms),
              nrow(greenhouses), nrow(inputs), nrow(season),
              nrow(scouting), nrow(prices)),
  Columns = c(ncol(sensor), ncol(costs), ncol(plots), ncol(farms),
              ncol(greenhouses), ncol(inputs), ncol(season),
              ncol(scouting), ncol(prices))
)
print(overview)
```

```{r missing-values}
cat("=== Missing Values in Sensor Data ===\n")
missing <- colSums(is.na(sensor))
missing <- missing[missing > 0]
print(round(missing / nrow(sensor) * 100, 1))
```

```{r crop-treatment-distribution}
cat("=== Plot Distribution by Crop and Treatment ===\n")
print(table(plots$crop, plots$treatment))
```

---

# 2. EDA — Sensor Data

## 2.1 Stress Index Distribution

```{r stress-distribution}
pct_high <- round(mean(sensor$plant_stress_index > 0.6) * 100, 1)

ggplot(sensor, aes(x = plant_stress_index)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 50, fill = "#E05A4E", alpha = 0.8, colour = "white") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0.6, colour = "darkred",
             linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0.7, colour = "black",
             linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.63, y = 1200,
           label = "High stress (0.6)", size = 3.5, colour = "darkred") +
  annotate("text", x = 0.73, y = 1000,
           label = "Critical (0.7)", size = 3.5, colour = "black") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(
    title    = "Distribution of Plant Stress Index — Full Season",
    subtitle = paste0(pct_high, "% of plot-days above 0.6 high stress threshold"),
    x = "Plant Stress Index (0 = healthy, 1 = critical)",
    y = "Number of plot-days"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
```

```{r stress-by-crop}
ggplot(sensor, aes(x = reorder(crop, plant_stress_index, median),
                   y = plant_stress_index, fill = crop)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.8, outlier.alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.6, colour = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(
    title    = "Plant Stress Index by Crop",
    subtitle = "Red dashed line = high stress threshold (0.6)",
    x = "Crop", y = "Plant Stress Index"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

```{r stress-by-treatment}
sensor %>%
  left_join(plots %>% select(plot_id, treatment), by = "plot_id") %>%
  group_by(treatment) %>%
  summarise(avg_stress = mean(plant_stress_index), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_stress)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(treatment, avg_stress),
             y = avg_stress, fill = avg_stress)) +
  geom_col(alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.6, colour = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(avg_stress, 3)), hjust = -0.2, size = 3.5) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "#78C96B", high = "#E05A4E") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title    = "Average Plant Stress Index by Treatment",
    subtitle = "Shade and Reduced Pest treatments show highest stress",
    x = "Treatment", y = "Average Plant Stress Index"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

## 2.2 Alert Analysis

```{r alert-overview}
cat("=== Alert Type Distribution — Full Season ===\n")
alert_counts <- sensor %>%
  filter(alert_flag == 1) %>%
  count(alert_type) %>%
  mutate(pct = round(n / sum(n) * 100, 1)) %>%
  arrange(desc(n))
print(alert_counts)
```

```{r alert-by-crop}
sensor %>%
  filter(alert_flag == 1) %>%
  count(crop, alert_type) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(alert_type, n), y = n, fill = crop)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge", alpha = 0.85) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Alert Count by Type and Crop — Full Season",
    x = "Alert Type", y = "Number of Alerts", fill = "Crop"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
```

```{r response-rate}
cat("=== Overall Alert Response Summary ===\n")
sensor %>%
  filter(alert_flag == 1) %>%
  summarise(
    total_alerts  = n(),
    total_actions = sum(action_taken, na.rm = TRUE),
    action_rate   = round(mean(action_taken, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    avg_delay     = round(mean(action_delay_days, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    same_day_pct  = round(mean(action_delay_days == 0, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1)
  ) %>%
  print()
```

## 2.3 Correlation Analysis

```{r correlation-matrix}
cor_vars <- sensor %>%
  select(
    plant_stress_index, pest_pressure_index, disease_risk_index,
    air_temp_c, relative_humidity_pct, vpd_kpa,
    substrate_moisture, substrate_ec, canopy_temp_c, alert_flag
  ) %>%
  drop_na()

cor_matrix <- cor(cor_vars)

corrplot(
  cor_matrix,
  method      = "color",
  type        = "upper",
  tl.cex      = 0.8,
  tl.col      = "black",
  addCoef.col = "black",
  number.cex  = 0.7,
  col         = colorRampPalette(c("#4575B4","white","#D73027"))(200),
  title       = "Correlation Matrix — Key Sensor Variables",
  mar         = c(0, 0, 2, 0)
)
```

---
